overview: Based on the published agenda, the Wausau School District Board of Education's Committee of the Whole meeting was scheduled to address several significant items including the 2026-27 Budget Reconciliation Plan and a Charter School Contract Renewal for the 2026-2031 period. The meeting was also expected to feature a legal expense summary for the third quarter and recognition of Riverview Elementary through the Excellence in Action segment.

discussions.body: The meeting was scheduled to include a recognition segment highlighting Riverview Elementary as part of the district's Excellence in Action series.

Elizabeth Channel, Assistant Superintendent of Operations, was scheduled to present a 5-minute summary report of all legal counsel expenses incurred during the third quarter of 2025-2026. The report was expected to be broken down by law firm and by type of legal advice sought, presented as a written report requiring no action.
Elizabeth Channel, Assistant Superintendent of Operations, was scheduled to present a 15-minute budget reconciliation plan for budgeting purposes only. Action was requested on this item.

Elizabeth Channel, identified as WAMCS Head of School, was scheduled to present the 2026-2031 charter contract for renewal in a 10-minute presentation. The agenda included two attachments: an updated charter contract dated March 3, 2026, and a charter contract renewal document from April 2026.

publicComment: A public and student comment period was included on this agenda.
actionItems: Board was expected to vote on approval of the minutes from the March 23, 2026 committee meeting
Board was expected to vote on the Audit of the Bills for April 2026
Action was requested for the 2026-27 Budget Reconciliation Plan
Action was requested for the Charter School Contract Renewal for the 2026-2031 period
title: Committee of the Whole Meeting - 2026-04-27
